messages.text: I'll take care of the new login screen. Going native with biometrics, JWT in keychain
are we plugging into the infra gateway? I heard they want all auth through it
nah, going direct to the auth service for now. Faster to ship
v2 ships next Thursday, REST payment integration is rock solid
5-step onboarding looks great in QA. Marketing approved the flow already
ok shipping the onboarding next week then
